AdditionalAttributes.description:
Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos.

Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos. Just sprinkle the taco seasoning mix on 500g of lean minced beef, add 1 onion, then follow the instructions on the back of the pack. After heating the taco shells and stuffing them with your filling, you'll have made ready to eat Mexican tacos in less than 25 minutes — ideal for Taco Tuesday. Don’t forget to top with guacamole, cheese, sour cream, and salsa. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for beans. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine with all your family and friends. Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix flavours up to 10 delicious tacos.

This product is suitable for vegans.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Leggo's Bolognese with Chunky Tomato, Garlic & Herbs Pasta Sauce is the perfect base for creating a rich, hearty bolognese that will satisfy the whole family. Made with Australian-grown tomatoes, this delicious, tomato-based sauce is infused with aromatic garlic and a blend of savory herbs. Simply brown some lean beef mince in a saucepan, add the sauce, and stir over medium heat until hot. Serve with your favourite cooked pasta and top with a generous sprinkle of parmesan for the perfect finish. Big on flavour and free from artificial colors, flavours, and preservatives, this sauce ensures a wholesome, mouthwatering meal every time. Proudly Australian-made, Leggo's Bolognese Sauce delivers both quality and convenience in one jar. Whether you're preparing a weeknight dinner or hosting a family gathering, it's an essential pantry staple for anyone who craves delicious, comforting meals with the goodness of local ingredients!

- Made in Australia with Australian grown tomatoes
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4 Health Star Rating
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Halal Certified

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.
